overclockSystem.note: Weapons gain overclocks at levels 6, 12 (Balanced), and 18 (Unstable). At each level the player chooses one overclock from the available options for that weapon. The wiki does not definitively assign which specific overclocks appear at level 6 vs 12 — both levels draw from the Balanced pool. Level 18 always offers Unstable overclocks.

levels.18: Unstable overclock — powerful with significant tradeoffs

weapons.name: M1000 Classic

unstable.name: Thick Boy
unstable.effect: Combines all clip rounds into 1 single mega-shot with greatly increased damage; effective fire rate becomes dependent on reload speed

weapons.notes: Targets highest HP enemy. Thick Boy is a signature build-defining OC that converts the clip into one mega-shot; with Bigger Mags (12 rounds) Thick Boy damage scales extremely high. Mastery in Crystalline Caverns (Hazard 2+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.name: Deepcore GK2

balanced.name: Big Game Hunter
balanced.effect: +20% Critical Damage, +20% Critical Chance (targets highest HP enemy)

unstable.name: Lead Wrapped Ammo
unstable.effect: +150% Damage, -20% Fire Rate, -20% Reload Speed

unstable.name: The Favourite
unstable.effect: +100% Damage, +100% Fire Rate; all other weapons -30% Damage, -30% Fire Rate

weapons.notes: Targets closest enemy. Fairly straightforward burst-fire rifle. Mastery in Crystalline Caverns (Hazard 2+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.name: Jury-Rigged Boomstick

balanced.name: Mini Pellets
balanced.effect: Doubles pellet count with reduced per-pellet damage

unstable.name: Thick Boy
unstable.effect: +200% Piercing, +200% Range; converts clip into single powerful round; fire rate becomes reload-speed-dependent

weapons.notes: Close-range shotgun with knockback. Mastery in Azure Weald (Hazard 2+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.name: Zhukov NUK17

unstable.effect: +200% Fire Rate, +100% Clip Size; bullets fire in spiral pattern

weapons.notes: Fires in 4 diagonal directions (45° angles) simultaneously. Starting weapon for Recon subclass. Mastery in Magma Core (Hazard 2+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.name: Cryo Grenade

balanced.name: Cluster Grenades
balanced.effect: -20% Damage, -20% Potency; grenade splits into 3 weaker versions

unstable.name: Gravitational Core
unstable.effect: +25% Explosion Radius; pulls enemies toward impact point before detonation

unstable.name: The Favourite
unstable.effect: +75% Damage, +75% Potency; other weapons -20% Potency, -20% Reload Speed

weapons.notes: Deals moderate cold damage and slows enemies. Gravitational Core pairs powerfully with Thick Boy M1000 — enemies cluster at impact before freezing. Mastery in Crystalline Caverns (Hazard 2+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.name: Voltaic Stun Sweeper

unstable.name: Disposable Tech
unstable.effect: No longer returns; explodes in an electrical burst

unstable.name: One-Handed
unstable.effect: Throws an additional sweeper in the opposite direction simultaneously

weapons.notes: Boomerang that travels outward and returns, dealing electrical damage. Targets closest enemy. Applies Shock status. Range affected by Weapon Range stat. Mastery in Salt Pits (Hazard 3+) grants +12% Potency.

weapons.name: TH-0R Bug Taser

balanced.name: Explosive Reload
balanced.effect: +25% Reload Speed; releases explosion on reload

unstable.name: Even More Beams

unstable.name: Unlimited Power
unstable.effect: Splits into multiple beams that each chain independently

weapons.notes: Discharges electrical beams at random enemies. Each extra beam increases clip size and chain count. Secondary beams reach 50% of base weapon range. Mastery in Hollow Bough (Hazard 3+) grants +7% Damage, +7% Potency.

weapons.name: Arc-Tek Cryo Guard

balanced.name: Disposable Tech
balanced.effect: +100% Lifetime, +40% Reload Speed; drones explode at end of life dealing 200% damage with knockback, leaving cold damage pools; lifetime upgrades shorten duration

stats.specialMechanic: explode on death with cold pools

balanced.name: Personal Space Invaders
balanced.effect: -50% Range, +2 Extra Drones; drones patrol close to player

unstable.name: Crisis Protocol
unstable.effect: +25% Damage, +25% Potency; drones rush to protect you when you take damage

unstable.name: More Drones
unstable.effect: +3 Extra Drones

weapons.notes: Deploys defensive drones that damage and slow enemies on contact. Disposable Tech + Personal Space Invaders provides concentrated area control and Frozen status. Also accessible by Engineer (Maintenance Worker subclass).

weapons.name: Drak-25 Plasma Carbine

overclocks.18: choose one Balanced or Unstable overclock (wiki note: unstable OCs for this weapon not confirmed separately)

weapons.notes: Shoots bursts of plasma that bounce on terrain. Targets closest enemy. Builds references 'Plasma Burst' as a level-12 OC — wiki lists it as 'Storm E-Mag' and 'Hot/Cold Plasma' variants. Mastery in Salt Pits (Hazard 4+) grants +12% Damage.

weapons.notes: Alternates between Acid and Electrical arrows; targets highest HP enemy. Adding bolt type OCs causes all bolt effects to trigger simultaneously. Applies both Shock and Corrode status by default. Mastery in Azure Weald (Hazard 4+) grants +12% Potency.
